temple.description: Clerics tend the wounded, speeding recovery for all.
temple.assigned_bonus_desc: Each assigned Cleric grants +1 HP/day healing to all recovering adventurers.
temple.retire_bonus_desc: One resurrection per expedition — a fallen adventurer may be saved.

training_grounds.description: Fighters drill here, improving combat readiness for all parties.
training_grounds.assigned_bonus_desc: Each assigned Fighter grants +1 party strength in dungeon combat.
training_grounds.retire_bonus_desc: All parties gain +3 attack strength permanently.

library.description: Magic-Users research arcane lore, occasionally identifying magical treasures.
library.assigned_bonus_desc: Each assigned Magic-User grants a 1% chance per expedition to find a Magic Item.
library.retire_bonus_desc: Parties can cast Identify freely — doubles magic item discovery chance.
